subject: [RFC PATCH 40/40] mm: page_alloc: SPB tracepoint instrumentation [DO-NOT-MERGE]

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch adds instrumentation to the Linux kernel's page allocation mechanism using tracepoints. It introduces new tracepoints to track various events related to memory allocation, including anti-fragmentation diagnostics. The patch bundles all these tracepoint definitions and call sites into a single commit for easier review before upstream submission. The instrumentation is designed for diagnostic purposes only, providing detailed information about memory allocation decisions and behavior.
